hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: Developer, designer, and perpetual learner based in San Francisco.

story.title: My Story
story.p1: I started coding at 16, building small games and websites for fun. What began as curiosity turned into a career spanning over 6 years of professional development.
story.p2: Today I specialize in building full-stack web applications with a focus on performance, accessibility, and delightful user experiences. I believe great software is both technically excellent and beautiful to use.
story.p3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me hiking trails around the Bay Area, experimenting with generative art, or contributing to open-source projects.

hero.title: Let's Work Together
hero.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
